pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts which enforce and check this exact path for the screenshot, matching the explicit task.json instructions.

Verified via Mozilla Firefox documentation and source code (StaticPrefList.yaml). The value 0 for use_document_fonts completely disables page-specified fonts; the value 2 for document_color_use forces custom color overrides always; and false for general.smoothScroll disables smooth scrolling.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated test page created by setup_task.sh to simulate CSS tracking via font enumeration and color detection. The required browser configurations correctly map to the underlying Mozilla Firefox preferences: 'browser.display.use_document_fonts' set to 0 completely disables page-specified fonts, 'browser.display.document_color_use' set to 2 'Always' overrides page colors with custom selections, and 'general.smoothScroll' set to false disables smooth scrolling. The expected output screenshot path is confirmed to be /home/ga/Documents/safe_render.png based on setup and export scripts.
